similar_merchants.title: Non-Financial Institutions – Foreign Currency, Liquid and Cryptocurrency Assets (for example: Cryptocurrency), Money Orders (Not Money Transfer), Account Funding (not Stored Value Load), Travelers Cheques, and Debt Repayment

mcc_list.title: Financial Institutions – Merchandise, Services, and Debt Repayment
mcc_list.description: This MCC must be used by Financial Institutions for the purchase of merchandise or services or the repayment of loans & debts. "Financial Institution" includes banks, savings and loans, thrifts, and credit unions. For example: the purchase of checks, other financial products, or promotional merchandise, deposits, the funding of an account, the purchase or reload of a stored value card, the purchase of foreign currency, Liquid and Cryptocurrency Assets (for example: cryptocurrency), money orders (a negotiable paper-based remittance – not a Money Transfer), travelers cheques, and loan fees or financial counseling service fees. This MCC must also be used for the repayment of a debt, loan, or credit card balance by a cardholder to the financial institution. A Financial Institution that sells Liquid and Cryptocurrency Assets such as cryptocurrency must include all required data in the authorization request and clearing record.

mcc_list.title: Orders (Not Money Transfer), Account Funding (not Stored Value Load), Travelers Cheques, and Debt Repayment
mcc_list.description: This MCC must be used for the funding of an account (excluding prepaid card loads), the purchase of foreign currency, Liquid and Cryptocurrency Assets (for example: cryptocurrency), money orders, or travelers' cheques that occurs at non-Financial Institutions such as currency exchanges or money order (a negotiable paper-based remittance – not a Money Transfer) Merchants. This MCC must also be used for the repayment of a loan or debt if the entity that holds the debt is not a financial institution. A Merchant that sells Liquid and Cryptocurrency Assets such as cryptocurrency must include all required data in the authorization request and clearing record. All other transactions at the same Merchant location must use the appropriate MCC for those transactions.

similar_merchants.title: Financial Institutions – Merchandise, Services, and Debt Repayment
